content:
# workflow-agent-handoff-report-template - Overview

Workflow type: handoff_report
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
Evidence: documented / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/handoff-report

When to use:
- Any task that claims to use the local database
- Frontend generation
- Database-backed research
- Agent handoff between tools

Inputs required:
- Task brief
- Queries run
- Chunks returned
- Files changed
- Verification output

AI summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.

# workflow-agent-handoff-report-template - Execution Steps

Workflow type: handoff_report
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
Evidence: documented / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/handoff-report

- Record exactly which local files or API endpoints were read.
- List each query and the key record/chunk ids used.
- Explain how retrieved knowledge affected concrete design or implementation choices.
- List changed files and run commands.
- State verification performed and known gaps.

AI summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.

# workflow-agent-handoff-report-template - Prompt Contract

Workflow type: handoff_report
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
Evidence: documented / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/handoff-report

- Do not just say 'used the database'; provide query and chunk evidence.
- Keep report concise but auditable.
- Report failures honestly.

AI summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.

# workflow-agent-handoff-report-template - Verification

Workflow type: handoff_report
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
Evidence: documented / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/handoff-report

- Report contains endpoint/file evidence
- Report contains chunk ids
- Report maps chunks to changes
- Report includes run/test evidence

AI summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.

# workflow-agent-handoff-report-template - Failure Modes

Workflow type: handoff_report
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
Evidence: documented / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/handoff-report

- Vague final report
- No query evidence
- Claims database usage but no chunks listed
- No verification gap disclosure

AI summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.

# workflow-agent-handoff-report-template - Handoff Report

Workflow type: handoff_report
Agent targets: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, local agents
Goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
Evidence: documented / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-25/handoff-report

- Files/API read
- Queries
- Chunk ids
- Design/implementation mapping
- Changed files
- Verification
- Gaps

AI summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.
